title: lessertia perennans var. polystachya
intro: Lessertia perennans var. polystachya, also known as Cape bloodroot, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Cape bloodroot are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
